title: ranunculus cordigerus subsp. diffusus
intro: Ranunculus cordigerus subsp. diffusus, commonly known as lesser spearwort, is a plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Ranunculus cordigerus subsp. diffusus is often used as a tincture, decoction, or salve, although its use should be carefully considered due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
